sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62943" key="lhci/arxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ληξίαρχ-ος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, the officer at Athens who kept order in the <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐκκλησία</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:8:104" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.104</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
